rule CDB_LinkedIn_Hidden_Code_Secretly_Searches_Y {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for LinkedIn Hidden Code Secretly Searches Your Browser for Installed Extensions"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-04"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-NK-01" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "LinkedIn" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
